title: PvP Toggle
description: A plugin that allows server administrators to enable and disable global PvP!
body:
# PvP Toggle

PvP Toggle is a plugin that allows server administrators to enable and disable global PvP! This plugin can disable direct player damage and projectile damage from players.

---

### Supported Versions

- 1.21

**Support for this project has been discontinued.**

---

### Commands

- /pvptoggle help
- /pvptoggle on
- /pvptoggle off

---

### LuckPerms Permissions

- pvptoggle.help
- pvptoggle.on
- pvptoggle.off
- pvptoggle.all
- pvptoggle.*

---

### Contact

---

### Extra Info

Supported Languages:

- English
